# Get background genes
# Last modified: 06/26/2025
# Author: Kewalin Samart

```{r load libraries and sort scripts}
library(readr)
library(here)
source(here("scripts/00_background_genes_PA_functions.R"))
```

```{r getting background genes from human Gene Ontology database}
GO_genes_bg <- GO_genes()
head(GO_genes_bg)
```

```{r getting background genes from human KEGG pathway database}
KEGG_genes_bg <- KEGG_genes()
head(KEGG_genes_bg)
```

```{r getting background genes from LINCS}
LINCS_genes_bg <- bg_LINCS_genes() 
head(LINCS_genes_bg)
```

```{r getting background genes from data}
metadata_path <- "data/v2/signatures/RNAseq_TB_signature_run_info.tsv"
data_path <- "data/v2/signatures/RNAseq/up"
extension <- "up"
data_genes_bg <- bg_from_data(metadata_path = metadata_path, data_path = data_path, extension = extension)
head(data_genes_bg)
```
```{r getting background genes from any source above}
tryCatch({
get_bg_genes(bg_source = "GO")
get_bg_genes(bg_source = "KEGG")
get_bg_genes(bg_source = "LINCS")
get_bg_genes(bg_source = "input data", metadata_path = metadata_path, data_path = data_path, extension = extension)
})
```
